title: lathyrus alpestris subsp. vivantii
intro: Lathyrus alpestris subsp. vivantii, also known as Vivant's pea, is a plant species within the Fabaceae family, specifically a subspecies of the alpine pea. This plant has been utilized for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lathyrus alpestris subsp. vivantii are primarily attributed to its high content of vitamins, minerals, and antioxidants, which can help protect against oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and its seeds can be used to produce a natural remedy for various health issues.
